title: cenchrus flexilis
intro: Cenchrus flexilis, also known as the silky grama grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Native to North America, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus flexilis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Cenchrus flexilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
